title: Code Boilerplate CLI
description: A Python command-line tool for storing, searching, listing, and copying reusable code snippets, terminal commands, and assignment templates.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, including project cards, resume content, contact workflow, GitHub stats, and a meta visualization page.

title: DSC190 Data Pipelines
description: A reproducible Python and DVC pipeline that reads raw event data and regenerates clean, transformed, and feature-ready datasets with a Marimo report.

title: Bikewatching
description: A JavaScript map interface for exploring bike activity by time, with a slider filter and visual legend for departure-versus-arrival balance.

title: Natural Language Date Parser
description: A dependency-free Python package that converts common natural-language date phrases into datetime.date objects.

title: DSC106 Project 3
description: A data visualization project combining notebooks with a web-based presentation layer built from HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and project data files.

title: Integer Factor Divisibility
description: A compact Python assignment repository focused on multiplying integers and checking divisibility by selected prime-power factors.

title: Fossil Fuel Subsidies Analysis
description: A Jupyter Notebook analysis project built around a fossil-fuel subsidies dataset for DSC106 exploratory data work.

title: Fat Content Analysis
description: A DSC80 project analyzing total fat content in relation to recipe ratings, presented as an HTML-based data science report.
